distinction_phrases_required_in_md: No metric is computed in this bundle.
A capital-efficiency score does not imply future returns.
An advisory allocation is not an execution instruction.
Candidate #10 remains deferred and is not connected by this spec.

no_profit_claim: This spec does not imply edge and does not allocate capital.
A defined formula does not imply profit.
A capital-efficiency score does not imply future returns.
No allocation is authorized by this spec alone.
